name: mailery
description: Mailery email management: CLI + MCP + HTTP serve + SDK. Local mode uses SQLite at ~/.hasna/emails/emails.db. The self_hosted cloud service (HASNA_MAILERY_STORAGE_MODE=cloud) is PURE REMOTE per Amendment A1: /health, /ready, /version probes plus an API-key-authenticated /v1 surface (domains, addresses, messages) reading/writing the shared cloud Postgres directly. Does not touch the live mailery.co SaaS database.
